phases.name: Core Database Setup
phases.goal: Foundation for multi-tenant database management — encryption, schema, connection manager, repository factory
success_criteria: EncryptionService can encrypt/decrypt database credentials using AES-256-GCM
schools table has all database connection fields; database_connections and tenant_backups tables exist
DatabaseConnectionManager returns configured GORM connection for any school ID within 50ms via sync.Map cache
RepositoryFactory creates tenant-aware repository instances from a school ID

phases.name: Repository Layer Refactoring
phases.goal: All 39 module repositories accept tenant DB connections via factory with service layer injection
success_criteria: Every module repository is instantiated via RepositoryFactory with school ID
Service layer receives tenant context from request context and passes to repository
Tenant context middleware extracts school from JWT and resolves tenant DB
Enhanced auth middleware cross-checks JWT school_id against resolved tenant DB
All existing SchoolID-based row isolation queries continue working unchanged

phases.name: Migration System
phases.goal: Core vs school migration directories, MigrationService, and tenant migration tools
success_criteria: Two migration directories: migrations/core/ and migrations/school/
MigrationService applies core migrations to core DB and school migrations to per-tenant DBs
MigrateAllTenants() iterates all active schools in parallel with configurable concurrency
Migration status tracked per school; failed migrations recorded with error details
Rollback scripts exist for all Phase 1 schema changes

phases.name: Enhanced Auth & Tenant Resolution
phases.goal: JWT → tenant DB resolution with caching and tenant-aware error handling
success_criteria: TenantResolutionService resolves JWT to TenantContext with DB connection, user, permissions
Tenant context cached in Redis with TTL to avoid core DB lookup per request
All API errors include tenant-aware error codes
Structured logs include school_id, request_id, tenant_db_host for every request

phases.name: Backup & Recovery System
phases.goal: Automated backup with pg_dump + S3 and point-in-time restore with validation
success_criteria: BackupService runs pg_dump, compresses, uploads to S3, records in tenant_backups
Backup scheduling configurable per school with retry and monitoring
RestoreService downloads from S3, validates checksum, restores, verifies data integrity
Point-in-time recovery supported; RTO < 1 hour, RPO < 15 minutes
Concurrent restore operations prevented; all operations logged

phases.name: Testing & Validation
phases.goal: Comprehensive integration, load, security testing and operations documentation
success_criteria: Integration tests cover: connection lifecycle, cross-tenant isolation, encryption, factory, migrations, backup/restore
Load tests validate: 1000+ concurrent connections, <50ms cache hit, <500ms cache miss, 100+ parallel migrations in 30 min
Security tests validate: FIPS-compliant encryption, no plaintext credentials in logs, no cross-tenant leakage
Deployment guides exist for provisioning, migration, rollback, backup/restore, monitoring
Runbooks exist for connection failures, migration failures, backup failures, recovery
